reasoning: The control SI-2(2) focuses on automated flaw remediation, which in a Kubernetes context can be mapped to ensuring that nodes and images are automatically updated and patched. Admission controllers can enforce policies for automatic patch management, nodes can be configured for automatic upgrades, and image vulnerability scanning can ensure images are patched. These practices align with the intent of automated flaw remediation.
title: Flaw Remediation - Flaw remediation | automated flaw remediation status determine if system compone
